# IMcpAuthGate interface

A pluggable authorization gate the Streamable HTTP adapter consults before dispatching a request (spec §23). An unauthenticated request is answered with a 401 challenge carrying `WWW-Authenticate`; an authenticated request yields the validated [`AuthInfo`](./AuthInfo.md).

```csharp
public interface IMcpAuthGate
```
